paragraphs.text: 这是第16篇中级文章。这篇文章会介绍一些有趣的知识。
paragraphs.translation: This is intermediate article number 16. This article will introduce some interesting knowledge.

paragraphs.text: 阅读的时候，注意新词语的用法。可以试着用这些词语造句。
paragraphs.translation: When reading, pay attention to how new words are used. Try to make sentences with these words.

paragraphs.text: 读完之后，用自己的话总结文章的主要内容。这样可以帮助你更好地理解。
paragraphs.translation: After reading, summarize the main content in your own words. This helps you understand better.
